description_long: This is a tall, slim beverage can with a predominantly blue exterior and a white top. The can features the iconic Pepsi logo, which consists of a red, white, and blue circular emblem, along with the word 'Pepsi' in bold white letters. Nutritional and product information is printed in small white text near the bottom edge of the can. The surface is smooth and metallic, reflecting light with a slight sheen. The can is sealed with a standard pull-tab on the top, indicating it is unopened. The overall appearance is clean, modern, and instantly recognizable as a soft drink container.
description: A tall, slim blue Pepsi can with a white top, featuring the Pepsi logo and product information in white text.
description_view_0: Partial side view showing the blue can, part of the Pepsi logo, and nutritional information near the bottom.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the full Pepsi logo, brand name, and most of the product information clearly.
description_view_2: Side view with the 'Pepsi' text partially visible and additional product details near the bottom.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the plain blue surface with minimal text and no visible logo.
attribute_brand_logo: A circular Pepsi logo in red, white, and blue is visible on the front, along with the word 'Pepsi' in white text.
attribute_nutritional_labeling: Nutritional information is visible in small white text near the bottom of the can.
